input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.11.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.11.2.4
            TITLE: non crushable items mounted behind the rear impact structure must not be able to come

            CONTENT:
            rule F.11.2.4: Non Crushable Items mounted behind the Rear Impact structure must not be able to come
F.11.2.4 Non Crushable Items mounted behind the Rear Impact structure must not be able to come 
through the Rear Impact structure.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 54 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
T - TECHNICAL ASPECTS

final_answer: Non Crushable Items mounted behind the Rear Impact structure must not be able to come through the Rear Impact structure.
